title: aethionema carneum
intro: Aethionema carneum, also known as Bloody Mary or Scarlet Cock's Comb, is a flowering plant belonging to the Brassicaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Aethionema carneum has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions, respiratory problems, and menstrual disorders, due to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of Aethionema carneum include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
